languages.text: {n}В мгновение, когда ваши клинки сталкиваются, лезвие Багряной пляски Кхейна разлетается на мириады осколков, исчезающих во вспышках ядовито-зеленого света. Вокруг воцаряется тишина, нарушаемая лишь отдаленным эхо выстрелов и взрывов.{/n}

{n}The instant your swords collide, the Crimson Dance of Khaine shatters into myriad shards that vanish in flashes of venomous green light. Silence descends, broken only by the distant echo of gunfire and explosions.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}В мгновение, когда ваши клинки сталкиваются, лезвие Багряной пляски Кхейна разлетается на мириады осколков, исчезающих во вспышках ядовито-зеленого света. Вокруг воцаряется тишина, нарушаемая лишь отдаленным эхо выстрелов и взрывов.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}The instant your swords collide, the Crimson Dance of Khaine shatters into myriad shards that vanish in flashes of venomous green light. Silence descends, broken only by the distant echo of gunfire and explosions.{/n}

{n}The instant your swords collide, the Crimson Dance of Khaine shatters into myriad shards that vanish in flashes of venomous green light. Silence descends, broken only by the distant echo of gunfire and explosions.{/n}

{n}The instant your swords collide, the Crimson Dance of Khaine shatters into myriad shards that vanish in flashes of venomous green light. Silence descends, broken only by the distant echo of gunfire and explosions.{/n}

languages.text: {n}你们的兵刃交击之时，凯恩的猩红之舞在瞬间崩裂，化作无数碎片，在幽绿色的闪光中消散殆尽。随后，四下一片死寂——唯有远方的枪火与爆炸声不断回响。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The instant your swords collide, the Crimson Dance of Khaine shatters into myriad shards that vanish in flashes of venomous green light. Silence descends, broken only by the distant echo of gunfire and explosions.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}你们的兵刃交击之时，凯恩的猩红之舞在瞬间崩裂，化作无数碎片，在幽绿色的闪光中消散殆尽。随后，四下一片死寂——唯有远方的枪火与爆炸声不断回响。{/n}

languages.text: {n}À la seconde même où vos deux armes s'entrechoquent, la Danse écarlate de Khaine se brise en une infinité de fragments qui disparaissent dans une lueur verte inquiétante. Le silence se fait dans l'assemblée, au milieu duquel ne résonne que l'écho lointain des coups de feu et des explosions.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The instant your swords collide, the Crimson Dance of Khaine shatters into myriad shards that vanish in flashes of venomous green light. Silence descends, broken only by the distant echo of gunfire and explosions.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}À la seconde même où vos deux armes s'entrechoquent, la Danse écarlate de Khaine se brise en une infinité de fragments qui disparaissent dans une lueur verte inquiétante. Le silence se fait dans l'assemblée, au milieu duquel ne résonne que l'écho lointain des coups de feu et des explosions.{/n}

languages.text: {n}En cuanto vuestras espadas chocan, la Danza Carmesí de Khaine estalla en mil esquirlas que se desvanecen en destellos de una luz verde enfermiza. Cae el silencio, puntuado por el eco lejano de disparos y explosiones.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The instant your swords collide, the Crimson Dance of Khaine shatters into myriad shards that vanish in flashes of venomous green light. Silence descends, broken only by the distant echo of gunfire and explosions.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}En cuanto vuestras espadas chocan, la Danza Carmesí de Khaine estalla en mil esquirlas que se desvanecen en destellos de una luz verde enfermiza. Cae el silencio, puntuado por el eco lejano de disparos y explosiones.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Kılıçlarınız çarpıştığı anda Khaine'in Kızıl Dansı parçalanıyor, zehirli yeşil ışık çakımları içinde kaybolan sayısız parçaya ayrılıyor. Sessizlik çöküyor, sadece uzaklardan gelen silah ve patlama seslerinin yankısı duyuluyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The instant your swords collide, the Crimson Dance of Khaine shatters into myriad shards that vanish in flashes of venomous green light. Silence descends, broken only by the distant echo of gunfire and explosions.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Kılıçlarınız çarpıştığı anda Khaine'in Kızıl Dansı parçalanıyor, zehirli yeşil ışık çakımları içinde kaybolan sayısız parçaya ayrılıyor. Sessizlik çöküyor, sadece uzaklardan gelen silah ve patlama seslerinin yankısı duyuluyor.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Als eure Schwerter aufeinandertreffen, zerspringt Blutroter Tanz von Khaine in zahllose Splitter, die in Blitzen aus giftgrünem Licht verschwinden. Die eintretende Stille wird nur vom fernen Echo von Schüssen und Explosionen gestört.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The instant your swords collide, the Crimson Dance of Khaine shatters into myriad shards that vanish in flashes of venomous green light. Silence descends, broken only by the distant echo of gunfire and explosions.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Als eure Schwerter aufeinandertreffen, zerspringt Blutroter Tanz von Khaine in zahllose Splitter, die in Blitzen aus giftgrünem Licht verschwinden. Die eintretende Stille wird nur vom fernen Echo von Schüssen und Explosionen gestört.{/n}

languages.text: {n}剣がぶつかり合う瞬間、カイヌの紅蓮の舞は無数の破片に砕け、毒の緑色の光を放ちながら消えていく。遠くで銃声と爆発音が響くが、それ以外は静寂である。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The instant your swords collide, the Crimson Dance of Khaine shatters into myriad shards that vanish in flashes of venomous green light. Silence descends, broken only by the distant echo of gunfire and explosions.{/n}
